title: Teacher development: inspections and outcomes as at 31 August 2025
body: "These official statistics include outcomes from initial teacher education (ITE) inspections and inspections of early career framework (ECF) and national professional qualifications (NPQ) lead providers in the 2024 to 2025 academic year. The statistics include:   main findings tables, charts and individual provider-level data quality and methodology report pre-release access list   Official statistics are produced impartially and are free from political influence. "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
